title: ICMR Scientist-D Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) Scientist D Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of ICMR. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR Scientist D Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation is relaxable in accordance with GOI instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC with 8 Years experience
qualification.details: MBBS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC with 8 Years experience. Desirable: MD/MS or equivalent degree recognised by MCI/NMC or MPH from a recognised university or Ph.D. from a recognised University in a subject related to Biomedical sciences.

salary_details.details: Salary: Rs. 78800 - 209200 Per Month (Level 12 of Pay Matrix)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICMR Scientist D Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR to complete the application.
